FraudNotificationService.note: SLA-critical fraud alerting path has minimal edge case coverage

MqMessageListener.note: Message routing and error handling largely untested

MessageOrderGuarantee.note: Gap detection and duplicate handling need more tests

ComplianceChecker.note: OFAC screening, structuring detection, and CTR filing have almost no test coverage. OCC examination will audit this.

ValidationEngine.note: Routing number validation, amount edge cases, and Unicode handling untested

PiiDetector.note: PII pattern matching for SSN, credit card, email formats not fully tested

PiiMasker.note: Masking output format and edge cases (null, empty, partial match) untested

TokenValidator.note: Token expiry, signature verification, and malformed token handling need tests
Basic happy path tested, edge cases missing

audit_logger.note: ZERO tests. Immutable audit logging is compliance-critical for SOX 404.

compliance_reporter.note: ZERO tests. Report generation for OCC/FinCEN completely untested.

retention_policy.note: ZERO tests. Incorrect retention could cause regulatory violations.

complianceCriticalSummary.recommendation: BLOCK cloud migration until compliance-critical paths reach 80%+ coverage
complianceCriticalSummary.regulatoryRisk: HIGH - OCC examination scheduled, current coverage insufficient for audit defense
